patient_summary:
• 73/F patient
• Primary Dx: Hyperlipidemia assoc. with type 2 diabetes, MRSA
• Key Procedures: LGH KISSEL HILL procedure (08/18/2025)
• Active Meds: 1 medication including Atorvastatin
• Allergies: NKDA
• Critical Labs: Glucose 199 (H); GFR 50 (A)
• Key History: Former smoker; difficulty walking/dressing
